reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
골프 컨셉이 독특해서 구매했는데, 실제로 보니까 디테일이 귀엽고 생각보다 잘 만들어져 있어서 만족했어요! 공, 홀컵 등 구성 요소마다 간식을 숨길 수 있어서 강아지가 하나하나 찾아가면서 노는 재미가 있더라고요.

특히 코로 밀고 뒤집고 하면서 노는 모습이 너무 귀여워요ㅋㅋ 단순히 물어뜯는 장난감이 아니라 활동적으로 놀 수 있어서 에너지 소모에도 도움이 되는 느낌이에요. 저희 강아지도 처음에는 낯설어하다가 금방 적응해서 엄청 집중해서 놀더라고요.

재질도 적당히 탄탄해서 쉽게 찢어질 것 같지 않고, 크기도 부담스럽지 않아서 집에서도 편하게 사용 가능해요. 디자인 + 기능 둘 다 만족스러운 제품이라 추천합니다!
reviews.content_en: I bought it because the golf concept was unique, and I was satisfied because the details are cute and it's made better than I expected! Since treats can be hidden in each component like the ball and hole cup, my dog has fun finding them one by one. Especially, the way my dog plays by pushing and flipping it with their nose is so adorable ㅋㅋ It's not just a chew toy but allows for active play, which really helps with energy burn. My dog was hesitant at first but quickly adapted and played with great focus. The material is sturdy enough that it doesn't seem like it'll tear easily, and the size isn't cumbersome so it's convenient to use at home. I recommend this product because both the design and functionality are satisfying!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 공을 너무 좋아해여 침질질 기존에 있는것 보다 탱탱한 느낌이여서 그런지 입에 넣고 물고 있는게 좋은가봐여 깃발도 좋아하긴하는데 공이 최애 너무 귀여워영
reviews.content_en: My dog loves balls so much, and since this one feels bouncier than the ones we had before, my dog seems to enjoy putting it in their mouth and chewing on it. They like the flags too, but the ball is their favorite 🥰 So cute!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 완전귀여워요 :-) 아니ㅡ공 보지미지 물고난리..ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's absolutely adorable 😊 Oh wait, my dog can't stop carrying that ball around ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 이 장난감은 무조건 사야겠다 싶어서 옷이랑 세트로 사줬는데 되게 잘 가지고 놀더라구요 노즈워크는 깃발 부분을 처음은 잘 못 꺼냈지만 두번째는 성공 하더라구요 아! 특히 공이 푹신푹신 한데 잘 튀기기 까지 해서 공놀이 하기도 재밌어 해요
reviews.content_en: I thought I had to buy this toy, so I got it as a set with clothes, and my dog plays with it really well. For the nose work, my dog couldn't get the flag part out at first but succeeded on the second try. Oh! Especially, the ball is so squishy and bounces so well that my dog really enjoys playing ball with it too!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
넘넘 귀여운 장난감🧡🧡🧡
고퀄이에요 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Such a cute toy! 🧡🧡🧡 High quality ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content: 후기 꼼꼼하게 보고 구입한 보람이 있네요^^ 너무 너무 좋아해요. 후기에 공이 통통 튀는데 소리 난다길래 어떤형태(?)인가 궁금했는데 딱 취향저격이네요^^ 소리도 삑삑 경쾌하고 고무공이 아닌데 통통 잘튀고~ 너무 만족스러워요
reviews.content_en: It was worth reading the reviews carefully before buying ^^ I really really love it. I was curious about what the ball looked like since the reviews mentioned it bounces and makes noise, and it's exactly my style ^^ The sound is pleasantly squeaky, it's not a rubber ball but bounces really well~ I'm so satisfied!

reviews.name: Y****
reviews.content:
어머, 너무 귀여워요 마침 아빠랑 산책 나간 사이 
 배송이 도착해서 깜짝 이벤트 해준다고 얼렁 오픈해서 좋아하는 간식 넣어놓고 기다렸네요
어찌나 좋아하던지~
보는 우리가 더 흐뭇해 가지구는ㅎ 노즈워크 쉬울 줄 알았는데 난이도 있네요 깊게 넣어놓은건 쉽게 꺼내진 못하더라구요 씩씩대며 오랜 시간 잘 갖구 놀더니 쉬다가 또 갖구 놀다가를 반복해요 
가끔 장난감이 금방 터지고 망가지기도 하는데
돈도 아깝고 애가 좋아하는데 치울 수 밖에 없는 스트레스가 있거든요
이 장난감은 튼튼하고 재질이나 마감도 잘 되어 있어서 오래 오래 잘 갖구 놀겠어요 
아이가 좋아하고 튼튼하고 이뻐서 완전 만족합니다
reviews.content_en: Oh, it's so cute! The delivery arrived while dad and I were out for a walk, so I quickly opened it as a surprise and put in a treat my dog loves and waited. My dog loved it so much~ We were even more delighted watching them enjoy it ㅎ I thought nose work would be easy, but it has some challenge. My dog couldn't easily get out the treats placed deep inside. My dog snuffled around for a long time playing well with it, then rested, then played again, repeating the cycle. Sometimes toys break and get damaged quickly, which stresses me out because it's wasteful and my dog loves it. But this toy is sturdy with great quality and finishing, so my dog will enjoy it for a long time. I'm completely satisfied because my dog loves it, it's sturdy, and it's pretty!

reviews.name: 미****
reviews.content_en: My dog plays with it SO well. Since they love new toys so much, I can't help but buy them ^^;;; One is a crunchy nose work toy and one squeaks, so they play with both toys well. It's rewarding to have bought them ^^

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 꺼내자마자 물고 달리기해서 사진찍기 힘들. 공에서 삑삑 소리나고 통통튀어 던지기 놀이 최적. 깃발 바스락 거려서 호기심 발동. 간식 숨겨 노즈워크하기 좋아요
reviews.content_en: As soon as I took it out, my dog grabbed it and ran off making it hard to take photos. The ball squeaks and bounces so it's perfect for fetch play. The flag crinkles and triggers curiosity. Great for nose work with hidden treats!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
옷이랑 모자세트 샀는데
산책하면서 노즈워크 해주니 너무좋아해요
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a set with clothes and outfit, and my dog loves doing nose work during walks!

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content: 애견까페 갔는데 엘리가 너무 좋아해서 찾아서 구매 했습니다
reviews.content_en: I went to a dog café and Ellie loved it so much that I found it and bought it.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
노즈 워크도 되고 골프공이 삑삑 거려서
공놀이 로만도 좋와여
reviews.content_en: It works as nose work and the golf ball squeaks so it's good for fetch play too!

reviews.name: K****
reviews.content: 귀여워요. 바잇미 장난감이 작아서 입이 작은 포메아가들한테 너무 좋아요
reviews.content_en: It's cute. BITE ME toys are small so they're perfect for small-mouth Pomeranians like mine!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
소형견이라  사이즈 딱 좋아요  ㅎㅎ
넘 귀엽습니다~!
reviews.content_en: The size is perfect for my small dog ㅎㅎ Super cute~!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
요즘 아이가 티비로 골프 열심히 보길래 사줬어요!
장난감에 흥미 없는 친구지만 노즈워크라 좋아해요!!
노즈워크 하고싶을때마다 혼자 골프 장난감 건드리고있네요ㅜ ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 
골프공 느낌도 말랑하구 탱탱볼처럼 잘 튀어서 좋아요
근데 원래 공 누르면 삑삑 소리가 아니라 쓕슉쑉 바람 빠지는것같은 소리가 나는게 맞나요..!
암튼 귀엽구 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: My pup has been watching golf on TV lately so I got this for them! Even though they're not usually interested in toys, they love this because it's nose work!! Every time they want to do nose work, they touch the golf toy on their own ㅜㅋㅋㅋㅋ The golf ball feels soft and bounces well like a bouncy ball, so I love it. But when you press the ball, is it supposed to make that air-leaking sound instead of a squeaky noise? Anyway, it's cute and I love it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 삑삑이 인형에 관심 없는 갱얼쥐인데 이건 공이 작아서 신나게 갖고 놀고 간식 넣어주니까 엄청 좋아해요 열심히 갖고놀다가 그대로 뻗은 우리 갱얼쥐^_^
reviews.content_en: My hamster has no interest in squeaky toys, but this one has a small ball so they play with it excitedly, and they love it when I put treats inside! After playing with it so hard, my hamster just flops over exhausted ^_^

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 장난감이 너무 귀여워요! 강쥐가 입에 물고 돌아다니는 게 아주아주 귀엽답니다 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The toy is so cute! The way my puppy carries it around in their mouth is absolutely adorable ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 원래공을제일좋아하는데,호흡기질환때문에무리한공놀이를할수없어서노즈워크인형을구매했어요.골프모양이너무귀여워여.보자마자달라고난리여서줬는데,흰공은물고빨고해서세탁했네요바로 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My dog originally loves balls the most, but because of respiratory issues they can't play intensely with balls, so I bought a nose work toy. The golf shape is so cute! My dog begged for it as soon as they saw it, so I gave it to them and they chewed and licked the white ball so much I had to wash it ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 공 느낌이 말랑말랑한데 잘 튕기니까 더 재밌어하는것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: The ball feels soft and bounces well so my dog seems to have even more fun with it!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽고 저레벨이라 아이가 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and since it's a low difficulty level, my pup loves it!

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
골프공 조아하는 감동이를 위해 엄청 많이 찾았던 장난감인데! 바잇미에서 뙇💚
빠른 배송과 너무 귀여운 장난감! 역쉬 바잇미죠~~|
너무너무 잘 갖고 놀아서 진짜 대대대대대대대 만족입니당😍
reviews.content_en: I searched so much for this toy for my pup who loves golf balls! Found it at BITE ME 💚 Fast shipping and such a cute toy! It's definitely BITE ME~~ My pup plays with it so so well, I'm really really really really really satisfied 😍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 하루종일 이 공만 가지고놀아요🥰 잘때보면 방석에 꼭 있구요 ㅋㅋㅋ 가끔 던져주다가 까먹고 어디 올려둔날에는 그쪽보면서 꺼내달라구 낑낑거려요😁 물욕이 별로 없는 강아지라서 놀아주기가 어려웠는데 드디어 인생장난감을 찾았네요 바잇미최고에요😗
reviews.content_en: My dog plays with just this ball all day long 🥰 Even when sleeping, it's right there on their bed ㅋㅋㅋ Sometimes when I throw it and forget to put it back, they stare at where I left it and whine asking me to get it ㅁ My dog doesn't have much interest in toys so it's been hard to play with them, but finally found the toy of their life! BITE ME is the best 😗

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
우리 호두가 진짜 너무 좋아하네요
하얀색공이 이리저리 들고다녀서 
회색이되면 씻어주고 또 회색되고 또 씻고
오늘 다른디자인공으로 또 주문했어요 :)
reviews.content_en: Our Walnut really loves it so much. They carry the white ball around everywhere, so when it becomes gray I wash it and it becomes gray again and I wash it again. Today I ordered another design of the ball ^)

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
요즘은 개프시대라고 해서 사봤습니다,, 
골프공이 통통 거리는거라서 엄청 좋아해요 ㅋㅋㅋ 
골프공만 따로 팔아도 살 것 같아요 🌝🤍 천으로 되어있어서 층간소음도 걱정없는 공이네요 🤍
reviews.content_en: I bought it because they say it's the era of dog peaks lately... The bouncy golf ball is really loved ㅋㅋㅋ I'd probably buy just the golf ball separately 🌝🤍 It's made of fabric so there's no worry about noise between floors 🤍

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content:
신상 좋아하는 댕댕이인데 
역시나 너무조아해요 ㅋㅋ
홀인원도 쳤구요~~~
특히 탱탱볼 어찌나 쫀득한지 튕겨놀기 재밌구
집사도 좋아합니다 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: My pup loves new things, and as expected, they really love this ㅋㅋ They even hit a hole-in-one~~~ Especially, the bouncy ball is so chewy and fun to bounce around with, and I as the owner like it too ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: y****
reviews.content:
저희 강아지 생일 선물로 산건데 보자마자 엄청 좋아해서 달려들더라구요ㅋㅋ
깃발 바스락 소리에도 반응하고, 골프공도 좋아하고, 무엇보다 연두색 몸통이 물었을 때 그립감이 좋은지 터그 놀이하면서 너무 좋아하더라구요~!!
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a birthday gift for my dog and they loved it so much the moment they saw it and ran right at it ㅋㅋ They react to the flag crinkling sound, love the golf ball, and most importantly when they hold the lime-colored body it has such good grip that they love playing tug with it so much~!!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 밥도 안먹고 놀고 있어요... 뭉치가 좋아하는 삼색 공이 품절이라 이걸로 대체했는데 너무 좋아해요ㅜㅜ
reviews.content_en: My dog Mung won't even eat and just plays... I wanted the tricolor ball they love but it was out of stock so I got this instead, and they love it so much ㅜㅜ

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 바잇미에서 구매한것중에 최애탬이래요! 이거를 제일 좋아합니다
reviews.content_en: It's my favorite item among things I've bought from BITE ME! This is their absolute favorite.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
이거 공을 진짜 좋아하네요!
꺼내고 있는데 제 손에 있는걸 낚아채갈 정도ㅎ
너무너무 잘 가지고 놀아요
홀인원 깃발은 힘이 없어서 꼬꾸라져요ㅋ
reviews.content_en: My dog really loves this ball! They snatched it from my hand while I was taking it out ㅎ They play with it so well. The hole-in-one flag is a bit flimsy so it droops ㅋ

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
강아지가 공을 너무 좋아해요~ 
받자마자 달라고해서 줬더니 흰색이.. 회색으로 ㅠㅠ
신나게 잘 놀아주니 대만족입니다
reviews.content_en: My dog loves the ball so much~ As soon as they got it they asked for it, and the white one became... gray ㅠㅠ But since they play so excitedly with it I'm very satisfied!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 너무너무 좋아해요 특히 골프 공 던져주면 신나서 뛰어가요
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it so much! Especially when I throw the golf ball, he gets so excited and runs after it 🎾

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 정말 바잇미 저 삑삑공은 최고에요.. 우리 누렁이가 간식 보다 좋아하는 공 입니다🤣 곰돌이 통통공에 이어 골프공도 최애 됐네요
reviews.content_en: The BITE ME squeaky golf ball is seriously the best.. It's the ball our Nureong loves even more than treats 🤣 After the teddy bouncy ball, the golf ball became his new favorite!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
공도 있고 바스락거려서 좋아하네요
앞으로도 잘 가지고 놀면 좋겠어요
reviews.content_en: Love that there's a ball and it makes a crinkling sound. Hope he keeps playing with it happily from now on 😊

reviews.name: 쏘****
reviews.content:
푸들이라 입이 작아 입에 딱 맞는 장난감이 별로 없는데
골프공이 딱 입에 맞아서 엄청 좋아하네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Since my poodle has a small mouth, it's hard to find toys that fit just right, but the golf ball fits perfectly in his mouth and he absolutely loves it! 😄

reviews.name: y****
reviews.content: 귀여워서 샀는데 사이즈도 괜찮아요! 언능아가가 갖고노는모습 보구싶어요ㅋ
reviews.content_en: I bought it because it's cute and the size is great too! I can't wait to see how my little one plays with it 😆

reviews.name: c****
reviews.content: 디피하기에도 이쁘고 잘가지고 놀아요^^
reviews.content_en: It looks cute for photos and he plays with it well! ^^

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
인간이 탐나서 주문한 물건
우리아들이 가지겠지만 주문한걸로 만족함
reviews.content_en: The human wanted it badly so I ordered it. Our son will probably have it, but I'm satisfied with the purchase 😊

reviews.name: 응****
reviews.content: 오랜만에 장난감 샀더니 난리났습니다 10분만에 조져버림
reviews.content_en: Got a toy after a long time and it was total chaos - he destroyed it in 10 minutes 💀

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content: 홀인원 해쥬,, 유리 강아지야
reviews.content_en: Hole in one for you... my sweet pup 🏌️

reviews.name: 깡****
reviews.content: 귀엽긴한데 사이즈가 너무 작아서 놀랐어요ㅠㅠ 5키로 비숑 강아지가 노즈워크 하기엔 너무 작아요…근데 골프공이 삑삑이에 엄텅 잘 튀는 재질이라 재미있어하네요~노즈워크보단 물어와 놀이하기에 좋은것 같아요!!
reviews.content_en: It's cute but I was surprised at how small it is 😭😭 It's too small for nose work for my 5kg Bichon... but the golf ball bounces really well with the squeaker and is super fun! It seems better for fetch games than nose work though! ~~

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 저 골프공 너무 좋아해서 입에서 놓질 않아요. 통통 잘튀길 수도 있고 재질도 딸 놀기 좋은 골프공에 귀여운 잔디와 홀인원 깃발 노즈워크 세트. 너무 좋네요
reviews.content_en: My pup absolutely loves the golf ball and won't let it out of her mouth. It bounces really well and the material is perfect for her to play with - such a cute set with the grass and hole-in-one flag nose work. Love it! 🏌️

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content:
골프치는 아빠보고 같이 놀아주라고 주문했는데,
골프공 보자마자 물고 안 주네요^^
상품도상태도 좋고 우리 공주님이 잘 갖고 놀아서 좋네요
reviews.content_en: I ordered it so dad who plays golf could play with her, but as soon as she saw the golf ball, she grabbed it and won't give it back 😄 The product is in great condition and our princess loves playing with it!

reviews.name: 예****
reviews.content:
노즈워크 삑삑이 다양하게 있어서 좋구 본체?도 던지고도 잘 가지고 놀아서 좋은 것 같아요 ㅎㅎ
다만 놀다보니 깃발은 행방불명,,ㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Great that there are various nose work squeaky toys, and she plays well with both throwing the main ball and carrying it 😄 Though the flag went missing during playtime hehe 😅

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 골프공 사이즈도 입에 물고 다니기에 적당하고, 노즈워크 하기에도 딱 좋아서 선물로 구매했는데 선물 받으신 분이 좋아해서 흐뭇했어요
reviews.content_en: The golf ball size is perfect for carrying in her mouth and ideal for nose work, so I got it as a gift and I'm so happy the recipient loved it! 🎁

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 귀여운 장난감!! 공은 엄청 잘튀어서 ... 침대밑으로 아주 잘들어가요 ..^^ 귀여우니까 용서ㅎ. 깃발 노즈워크 좋아라해용
reviews.content_en: Such a cute toy!! The ball bounces so well that... it rolls under the bed very easily 😄 But it's so cute I forgive it 😂 She loves the flag nose work!

reviews.content:
2개월 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아요.
공을 젤 좋아하고 그 다음 골프채...몸통은 그날로 뜯어져서 수명을 다했어요ㅜㅜ;;;
reviews.content_en: My 2-month-old puppy loves playing with it. He loves the ball the most, then the golf club... but the body got destroyed the same day 😭😭

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 너무귀여워요! 골프공이 삑삑거리면서 통통튀구 애기가 아주좋아해요~ 깃발은 바스락바스락  노즈워크도 잘 놀아요^^
reviews.content_en: So adorable! The golf ball squeaks and bounces so nicely and my baby absolutely loves it! ~ The flag crinkles and he plays with the nose work well too! ^^

reviews.name: c****
reviews.content:
이거 사준 후로는 이거만 가지고 놀아서
공이 다 찌그러졌어요 ㅋㅋㅋ
새로 하나 사줬더니 또 좋아서 난리났네요
reviews.content_en: Since I got this, he only plays with this and now the ball is all dented 😂 Got him a new one and he went crazy over it again!

reviews.name: c****
reviews.content:
바잇미에서 새로운 장난감 나오길 기다렸어요 ㅋㅋ
디자인은 제가 맘에들어서 샀는데 울 강쥐도 잘 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: I was waiting for BITE ME to release a new toy 😄 I bought it because I loved the design, and my pup loves playing with it too!

reviews.name: m****
reviews.content: 깃발안에 넣은 먹이는 아직 찾기 힘들어하는거 같지만 찾기 쉬운거 보다 어려운거 찾고 있었는데 굳이에요!
reviews.content_en: My pup still seems to struggle finding the treats inside the flag, but I was actually looking for something more challenging rather than easy. Perfect! 🎯
